notes: UK's only dedicated pre-seed investor in AI-first startups; typically invests £100k–£750k. Led TileBio £1.6m seed round (Glasgow, March 2026). British Business Investments committed £10m to the fund in February 2025. Source: https://glasgowcityofscienceandinnovation.com/glasgow-healthtech-spinout-raises-1-6m-to-transform-cancer-diagnosis-with-ai/

Venture fund and institute focused on AI, deep science, 5G, biotech, and fintech. Long-term investor in Edinburgh-based stampfree.ai — participated in every fundraising round including the May 2026 £1.03m raise. Source: https://www.digit.fyi/edinburgh-ai-ecommerce-firm-raises-over-1m-in-new-investment/

Silicon Valley-based VC. Co-led Cnuic $3m pre-seed round (Edinburgh, April 2026) alongside Tensor Ventures. Source: https://tech.eu/2026/04/28/cnuic-secures-eur3m-pre-seed-to-unlock-next-generation-photonic-chip-production/

UK-based deep-tech VC. Participated in Cnuic $3m pre-seed round (Edinburgh, April 2026). Source: https://tech.eu/2026/04/28/cnuic-secures-eur3m-pre-seed-to-unlock-next-generation-photonic-chip-production/

Participated in Cnuic $3m pre-seed round (Edinburgh, April 2026). Very limited public profile. Source: https://tech.eu/2026/04/28/cnuic-secures-eur3m-pre-seed-to-unlock-next-generation-photonic-chip-production/

Scottish Borders-based angel investment syndicate founded in 2004. Members invest personal capital matched by Scottish Enterprise. Led £506k HonuWorx, £430k Kaly and £620k Sisaltech seed investments announced May 2026. Has deployed £6.8m across Scottish early-stage businesses in ~2.5 years, levering £40m+ total investment. Source: https://www.scotsman.com/business/tricapital-scots-syndicate-leads-ps3m-plus-deals-and-unveils-key-hire-8640052
